      @keyframes square-spin {
          25% {
              transform: perspective(100px) rotateX(180deg) rotateY(0);
          }
          50% {
              transform: perspective(100px) rotateX(180deg) rotateY(180deg);
          }
          75% {
              transform: perspective(100px) rotateX(0) rotateY(180deg);
          }
          100% {
              transform: perspective(100px) rotateX(0) rotateY(0);
          }
      }

      @keyframes loading-fade-out {
          0% {
              opacity: 1;
          }

          100% {
              opacity: 0;
          }
      }

      #loading-modal {
          display: block;
          position: fixed;
          top: 0;
          left: 0;
          width: 100%;
          height: 100%;
          background-color: #fff;
          z-index: 1000;
      }

      .loading-content {
          position: absolute;
          top: 50%;
          left: 50%;
          transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
          color: white;
      }

      .square-spin {
          & > div {
              -webkit-animation-fill-mode: both;
              animation-fill-mode: both;
              width: 50px;
              height: 50px;
              background: #fff;
              -webkit-animation: square-spin 3s 0s cubic-bezier(0.09, 0.57, 0.49, 0.9) infinite;
              animation: square-spin 3s 0s cubic-bezier(0.09, 0.57, 0.49, 0.9) infinite;
          }
      }

      .loading-fade-out {
          animation: loading-fade-out 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;
      }

      .is-loading-open {
          overflow: hidden;
      }
	</style>
	<script>
      const HomeLoading = () => {
          console.log('start loading');
          window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
              const htmlTag = document.documentElement;
              const documentBody = document.body;
              if (!documentBody.classList.contains('t-home')) return;
              const classNameIsLoadingOpen = 'is-loading-open';
              const classNameIsLoadingProgress = 'is-loading-progress';
              const classnameIsLoadingTimeout = 'is-timeout';
              const classNameIsLoaded = 'is-loaded';
              const isLoadingProgress = () => htmlTag.classList.contains(classNameIsLoadingProgress);
              const isLoadingTimeout = () => htmlTag.classList.contains(classnameIsLoadingTimeout);

              const loadingModal = document.getElementById('loading-modal');
              const loadingText = document.getElementById('loading-text');


              const ModalActions = {
                  open: () => {
                      htmlTag.classList.add(classNameIsLoadingProgress);
                      documentBody.classList.add(classNameIsLoadingOpen);
                      loadingModal.style.display = 'block';
                      loadingModal.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
                  },
                  close: (text = '読み込み完了') => {
                      console.log('close');
                      loadingText.textContent = text;
                      loadingModal.classList.add('loading-fade-out');
                      htmlTag.classList.remove(classNameIsLoadingProgress);

                      loadingModal.addEventListener('animationend', () => {
                          documentBody.classList.remove(classNameIsLoadingOpen);
                          loadingModal.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
                          loadingModal.style.display = 'none';
                          htmlTag.classList.add(classNameIsLoaded);
                      });
                  },
              };
              /**
               * 一定時間経過してもloadが起きない場合にモーダルを閉じる
               */
              const handleLoadingTimeout = () => {
                  if (!isLoadingTimeout()) {
                      htmlTag.classList.add(classnameIsLoadingTimeout);
                      ModalActions.close('読み込みがタイムアウトしました｡コンテンツをご利用いただけます｡');
                  }
              };

              ModalActions.open();
              setTimeout(handleLoadingTimeout, 10000); // 一定時間立ってもloadが起きない場合処理を打ち切る

              // ページの読み込みが完了したらモーダルを閉じる
              window.addEventListener('load', () => {
                  console.log('load');
                  if (!isLoadingTimeout()) {
                      ModalActions.close();
                  }
              });
          });
      };
      HomeLoading();
	</script>
